title: FERROS Capability Grant v0
description: S2-owned capability grant schema candidate for G2 freeze. Mirrors the current ferros-profile CapabilityGrant serde boundary without signatures or revocation metadata yet.

profile_id.description: Granted FERROS profile identity as currently serialized by ferros-profile.

capability.description: Granted capability token understood by downstream policy consumers.

revoked_at.description: Optional timestamp marking when the grant was revoked in the current pre-signature revocation model.

revocation_reason.description: Optional human-readable reason recorded when the grant is revoked.
